text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Sprinters Stakes has finally
arrived. It's time to show off how hard I've been
working.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, we sure have been through a lot, haven't
we? But you know, I really am glad you're my
trainer.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to bloom into the most beautiful flower
in the world, so please... Keep on watching over
me.
